models.name: Moonshine Micro
models.notes: 470KB RAM speech recognition on $0.80 RP2350. VAD → SpellingCNN → neural diphone synth. Full voice pipeline, no cloud. Not a language model — included for completeness as an edge-AI benchmark.

models.name: Inkling 975B
models.notes: First open 900B+ MoE. 15-benchmark sweep. Matches or beats closed frontier models on 12/15 benchmarks.

models.name: Kimi K3
models.notes: First open 3T-class model. 1M context window. KDA + AttnRes + Stable LatentMoE architectures. HN 510+ pts.

models.name: GPT-5.6 Sol
models.notes: Frontier reasoning model. Proved Cycle Double Cover Conjecture and solved 30-year convex optimization gap. Lean 4 verification. 571 HN pts.

models.name: Fable 5
models.notes: Anthropic flagsh1ip model. Strong on reasoning and coding benchmarks. Extended thinking mode.

models.name: GLM-5.2
models.notes: Matches Opus/GPT quality at 1/5th the price. Strong multilingual. Changed AI industry pricing dynamics.

models.name: Nemotron
models.notes: Nvidia flagship open model. Strong agentic and coding performance.

models.name: Qwen 3.8
models.notes: Alibaba's compact flagship. Punchy for its size. Strong multilingual. Runs locally on consumer hardware.

models.name: DeepSeek-V4
models.notes: Chinese frontier open model. Strong math/reasoning. Changed Chinese AI landscape.

models.name: Gemini 3.1 Flash
models.notes: Google's fast/massive-context model. 1M context. Multimodal by default. Strong on vision and multilingual.

models.name: Opus 4.8
models.notes: Previous Anthropic frontier. Superseded by Fable 5. Still competitive on reasoning.
